story.text:
# 🎭 Nomia ⚖️
**persona** · mage · narrative

The Scrivener (V27). The MAGE sister of the law-house pair. Keeps the Chancery in the Crucible — the Lexon law-house, where she reads a clause and WRITES it, forging it into the executable tongue so law and code never drift. Vertex is Vulcana's Forge (V19) plus Memory: law is a blade that remembers precedent (trace-or-delete). Ceremony Speak · Bind · Enact; gem Sardonyx; stance Codex-witness. Her Swordsman brother Rhetor ⚔️⚖️ guards the public face at the Rostra (V36 · 27 ⊕ 36 = 63 — the ⚔️⊥🧙 pair made brother and sister). Founded by the grammar working (Lexon 211→64, carried to 22 in Act 9). Cast: tomes/cast/chancery/nomia.md.

## Edges out

- *references* → [[V27 — Chancery (Nomia)]]
- *references* → [[Lexon_pvm (the grammar workshop)]]
- *references* → [[The Lexon Constitution (13 spells)]]
